title: Deadly Guacamole
description: Lava's boring. Ultra spicy guacamole that makes you burn if you swim in it isn't.
body:
This texture pack makes lava kinda look like **really runny guacamole**. [Download on Planet Minecraft]([https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/deadly-guacamole/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/deadly-guacamole/))
![Deadly Guacamole Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5539edac549e1354b89319703fce910d40264b3.png)
